name: Illegal Parking Report
description: Sender is reporting illegal parking by someone else
checks: Is the issue ongoing or a one-time incident?
Is there a safety concern (blocking driveway, school zone)?

outcomes.ranger_dispatch: Clear location provided, ranger can investigate
outcomes.noted: Report logged but insufficient detail for immediate action

metadata_fields.safety_concern: Whether there is a safety concern (true/false)

response_templates.ranger_dispatch: Thank you for reporting the parking issue at {location}. A Council Ranger will attend to investigate.
response_templates.safety_urgent: Thank you for reporting the urgent parking safety concern at {location}. This has been flagged as priority. If immediate danger, also contact NSW Police on 131 444.
response_templates.noted: Thank you for your parking report. It has been logged. If you can provide additional details, it will help our Rangers investigate.
